utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Okay , some tricks of the trade .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Now , I have never been able to cry as an actor , so if I am in a scene where I have to cry , I cut a hole in my pocket , take a pair of tweezers , and just start pulling .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Or ah , or , let say I wanna convey that I have just done something evil .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: That would be the basic I have a fishhook in my eyebrow and I like it Okay , let say I have just gotten bad news , well all I do there is try and divide 232 by 13 .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: And that is how it is done .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Great soap opera acting tonight everybody , class dismissed .

emotion_cause.span: 6_Great soap opera acting tonight everybody , class dismissed .
